description_long: This sculpture depicts two robed human figures standing closely together on a rectangular base, engaged in an expressive interaction. The left figure appears to be a woman with a hooded cloak, her right hand raised near her face, while the right figure, possibly male, gestures with his left hand across his chest. Both figures are rendered in a realistic, classical style, with detailed drapery and naturalistic postures. The surface is weathered, with visible textural variations and some discoloration, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with the forms of the robes and figures merging into a rougher, less defined surface. The entire piece is carved from a single block of stone, giving it a solid and heavy appearance.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of two robed human figures in expressive interaction, standing on a rectangular base. The figures are detailed in front and more roughly finished in back.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures' faces and detailed drapery, with the left figure's hand raised and the right figure gesturing across his chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the left figure, with the cloak and robe's folds visible and the right figure mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of both figures, with less detail and more roughly carved surfaces blending together.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the profile of the right figure, with the left figure mostly hidden and the drapery's flow visible.
attribute_subject_matter: two robed human figures in expressive interaction
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
